title: CI: Win Installer failing
body:
e.g. https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5675517605576704
```
Downloading https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/build/6004412846440448/Windows Cross/repo/repo.tbz
Download failed - retrying: NotFound
Download failed - retrying: NotFound
Download failed - retrying: NotFound
Download failed - retrying: NotFound
Download failed - retrying: NotFound
Download failed - retrying: NotFound
The remote server returned an error: (404) Not Found.
At C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\scriptsdd18e3816c7efc6d9c168f6a92546190.ps1:16 char:13
+             throw $_.Exception
+             ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    + CategoryInfo          : OperationStopped: (:) [], WebException
    + FullyQualifiedErrorId : The remote server returned an error: (404) Not Found.
```
Known bug? Is there a way to make Win Installer less network-dependent?

comments.body: I have a workaround. Will reopen if I see this anywhere other than 17831.
